items.briefing:
A cyberattack on the Canvas learning platform is raising concerns for Australian schools, with educators urged to review what student data may have been exposed. Separately, a new malware campaign called KongTuke is targeting organisations through Microsoft Teams chat messages — a reminder that threats don't only arrive via email. There are also warnings that scammers are increasingly impersonating celebrities and athletes to defraud individuals online, with the industry now worth billions globally.

A suspicious website posing as a refugee support page has also been flagged as potentially part of a coordinated influence campaign ahead of Victorian elections. **Practical tip:** Be cautious of unexpected Microsoft Teams messages containing links — verify with the sender directly before clicking anything.
